description: Sendbird provides APIs and SDKs for in-app chat, voice/video calls, live streaming, customer support, and business messaging. Its products let companies add real-time communication and support workflows to their applications.
summary: Sendbird exposes five documented REST API surfaces for Chat, Calls, Live, Desk, and Business Messaging, each using dashboard-issued API tokens; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in public docs.
